hint: Unmissable story achievement. Break out of the Combine prisoner transport van.
Unmissable story achievement. Enter the Quarantine Zone.

description: Pick up and smash 50 glass bottles.
hint: Grab glass bottles (especially wine/liquor bottles) and physically throw them against walls or the floor to break them. Keep doing this throughout the game.
Inside Alyx's hideout at the very start of the game, find the glass terrarium containing a Snark. Grab the shaker of food nearby and sprinkle it into the tank.
Just after exiting the hideout, you will drop down into a small playground area. Grab a bucket or nearby object and roll it down the yellow plastic slide.
When looking out of Russell's lab window, he asks you to throw him an object to test the Gravity Gloves. Grab the baseball sitting on the desk and throw it to him.
Inside Russell's lab, find Russell. Use the Gravity Gloves or your hands to pick up the yellow Geiger counter and hold it close to his face.
Right after Russell throws you the pistol, he will toss a magazine of ammo out the window. Catch it out of the air using the Gravity Gloves.
Unmissable story achievement. Given when a Vortigaunt throws you a Headcrab heart to use in the healing station.

description: Test your grip on a headcrab heart.
hint: When the Vortigaunt tosses you the gross, pulsing Headcrab heart, grab it with your hand and physically squeeze your controller's grip button to crush it.
Unmissable story achievement. You acquire the shotgun from the ceiling-hanging zombie holding it.
Unmissable story achievement. Enter the explosive Xen flora area.
Unmissable story achievement. Survive the train yard encounter and crash the train.
Unmissable story achievement. Reach the Northern Star Hotel.
Unmissable story achievement. Make your way into the basement of the hotel.
Unmissable story achievement. Escape the toxic underground pit in the hotel.
Unmissable story achievement. Acquire the Submachine Gun in the upper levels of the hotel.
Unmissable story achievement. Disconnect the substations powering the Vault.
Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the enemies and navigate the processing plant.
Complete Chapter 7 without ever using the trash compactor to kill 'Jeff'. Lock him inside the freezer instead before you leave the area.
Kill 'Jeff'. Lock him inside the trash compactor at the end of the chapter and press the button to crush him.
While avoiding Jeff, there is a headcrab locked inside a glass cage. Use your pistol to shoot and kill the headcrab before it breaks out and makes noise.
When you open a specific cabinet door in the distillery to get a battery, several glass bottles will tumble out. Catch at least one before it hits the floor and breaks.
Unmissable story achievement. Make your way through the zoo enclosures.
Unmissable story achievement. Bypass the three power locks in the tanker yard.
Unmissable story achievement. Ascend the water tower structure.
Unmissable story achievement. Wake up after the Strider attacks the structure.
Unmissable story achievement. Successfully enter the floating Vault.
Unmissable story achievement. Complete the game.
Check the pockets or nearby surroundings of dead bodies. Pick up an item (like a resin puck or ammo clip) located directly on a corpse.

description: Break open a supply crate with your hands.
hint: Instead of shooting a wooden supply crate, pick it up with your hands and throw it onto the floor/wall to smash it.
Find a Combine upgrade fabricator, insert enough gathered resin, and purchase any upgrade for your pistol.

description: Kill a grunt by shooting their gas tank.
hint: Aim for the red explosive gas tanks strapped to the backs of Combine Grunts.

description: Kill a Combine Heavy while their shield is up.
hint: When a Combine Heavy deploys their blue energy shield, toss a grenade over/behind it, or shoot explosive barrels near them to kill them without breaking the shield.

description: Use the gravity gloves to loot an item off a living Combine soldier.
hint: During combat, point your Gravity Glove at the belt/chest of a living Combine soldier and flick to steal a magazine of ammo or a grenade.

description: Snatch a Xen grenade from its resting place.
hint: Approach the glowing blue Xen grenade plants and carefully pluck the grenade from the center without disturbing the tentacles.

description: Use the multitool to hack a tripmine.
hint: Use your Multi-Tool to trace the wiring on an explosive tripmine to disable it safely without blowing it up.

description: Use the gravity gloves to intercept an incoming enemy grenade in mid-flight.
hint: When a Combine soldier throws a grenade at you, use the Gravity Glove flick motion to catch it out of the air.
Stand extremely close to Jeff (within an arm's length) and hold perfectly still so he sniffs the air but doesn't attack you.
In the distillery, find a bottle of Vodka. Instead of throwing it or dropping it, place it in your wrist inventory slot and carry it until you return to the surface.
Find Gnome Chompski on a couch outside Russell's lab. You must carry him in your hands or a bucket through the ENTIRE game, all the way to the Vault.

description: If you are reading this achievement, Gabe Newell has successfully launched Gnome Chompski into space. If you did not also receive the achievement 'Manufacturing Ascent', Newell has abandoned his plans to shoot Noam Chomsky into space.
hint: This achievement was globally unlocked automatically for all players when Gabe Newell sent a titanium Gnome Chompski into space with Rocket Lab in 2020. You will earn this simply by launching the game.
